title: Turn of the Tide
writer: Leo Walmsley, L. du Garde Peach, J.O.C. Orton
actors: John Garrick, J. Fisher White, Geraldine Fitzgerald
plot: The arrival in a Yorkshire fishing village of the Lunns with a modern fishing boat is deeply resented by the Fosdycks. Eventually hostilities are overcome and the families join forces to get a modern deep sea fishing boat.
